title: Form Validation Failed → Recovery Flow
description: Typical negative journey for form errors (NEG-400-validation-required + NEG-400-validation-format)
mermaid:
graph TD
    A[User submits form] --> B{Validation errors?}
    B -->|Yes| C[NEG-400-validation-required or NEG-400-validation-format]
    C --> D[Highlight invalid fields + show messages]
    D --> E{User corrects?}
    E -->|Yes| F[Re-submit form]
    F -->|Success| G[Happy path]
    F -->|Fail again| C
